mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO RAW_FILE_ROW ( row_id, upload_id, row_num, row_json, created_at )
SELECT #{row.rowId}, #{row.uploadId}, #{row.rowNum}, #{row.rowJson}, #{row.createdAt} FROM dual
INSERT INTO RAW_FILE_ROW ( row_id, upload_id, row_num, row_json, created_at ) VALUES ( #{row.rowId}, #{row.uploadId}, #{row.rowNum}, #{row.rowJson}, #{row.createdAt} )
